change.description: Assembly Info Fixes.
Assembly Info Fixes.
Initial public release of the Unified Translator Manager plugin.
Single-record translation workflow: edit target cells directly in the grid with automatic Modified flag and yellow highlight.
Bulk translation workflow: export visible rows to Excel (.xlsx), edit externally, and re-import changed target values.
Excel export/import implementation using only System.IO.Compression + System.Xml (no ClosedXML or OpenXML SDK dependencies, avoiding System.Memory assembly conflicts inside XrmToolBox host).
In-grid editing: EditMode=EditOnEnter (single click to start editing), live target-cell updates without DataTable rebinding during editing, immediate yellow highlight on commit.
Scope selector supporting Table, Form, Choices, and combinations.
Solution-scoped loading (strongly recommended) or full unmanaged-metadata scan with explicit warning dialog.
Warning prompt when loading a session without a specific solution selected, advising user that the operation may take a very long time on large environments.
Built-in Help button in the toolbar with step-by-step instructions for both single-record and bulk translation workflows.
Toolbar actions: Load context, Load session, Save changes, Publish changed, Publish all, Help, Close.
Real-time status updates and row counters (total visible / modified) during edit, save, and publish operations.
Auto-managed Modified checkbox column (read-only, computed from target != original), preventing destructive user toggles.
Support for translating tables, forms, fields, choices (option sets), views, business process flows, and other Dataverse / Dynamics 365 metadata components.
Import summary dialog showing changed / unchanged / not found / ambiguous / duplicate / invalid rows after Excel import.
Filter panel: search text, scope (table/form/choices), solution picker, entity picker, source/target language pickers, checkboxes (only modified / only empty target / only empty source).
Export/import round-trip preserves row identity via Entity + Key + Property column matching (no manual GUID handling required).
Save operation writes modified rows back to Dataverse; Publish operation publishes only the touched entities or the entire solution.
Session state tracking: detects unsaved changes and prompts for confirmation before closing or loading a new session.
Supports both base-language source display and target-language editing in a single grid view.
